plays.playDescription: (9:09) T.Brady pass short left to W.Welker for 2 yards, TOUCHDOWN. NE 12-Brady 30th TD pass of season, 2nd Patriot ever with 30+ TD passes in a season.  Extends his NFL record to 8 games to start the season with 3+ TD passes. NE 32nd 1st down of game, ties team record (at Buffalo 12/11/05) NE 12-Brady finishes the game with a passer rating of 125.5.  Has had a passer rating of 100+ in all 8 games this season.
